title: Cherry-pick PR #782: Fix regex in the chess.com link import
description:
The Problem: The previous regex required a /live/ segment (e.g., chess.com/live/12345), which does not always exist immediately after a non-daily game finishes.

The Fix: Modified the regex to accept both the existing prefixes and the standard post-game URL format.

in_scope: Port upstream PR #782 changes to our fork
Resolve any merge conflicts with our modifications
Verify the fix works in our build
out_of_scope: Unrelated changes to the same files

requirements: The bug/feature from PR #782 works correctly

acceptance_gates: PR #782 behavior verified in running app

manual: Verify PR #782 fix in running app
